title: ammannia aspera
intro: Ammannia aspera, also known as the rough ammannia or rough red ammannia, is a plant species in the family Lythraceae, native to tropical Africa and Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antipyretic effects. The health benefits of Ammannia aspera include reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating various skin conditions such as eczema and acne. Ammannia aspera can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, which are commonly used in traditional medicine to treat a range of health issues.
